jobDescription: GreenGrid Labs is a fictional climate technology company building operations software for distributed renewable energy and sustainable infrastructure teams. The Operations & Implementation Associate will support customer onboarding, implementation planning, project coordination, CRM updates, internal automation, and post-launch customer success. The role works with global and remote teams to translate business requirements into practical setup checklists, maintain clean tracker data, document workflows, and help clients adopt new tools safely. Useful experience includes operations, implementation support, customer success, business development coordination, SQL or spreadsheet analysis, CRM hygiene, process documentation, and clear English and French communication. This is a salaried remote-friendly role with a practical application process and a near-term deadline.
notes: Fictional smoke-test opportunity only. Use this to verify scoring, application pack generation, daily brief output, and tracker export without submitting or sending anything.
